layout_guidelines.container: max-w-[480px] mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden bg-[#0f1715] relative shadow-2xl border-x border-[#243432]

Map.style_strategy: CSS Filter Hack for Dark Mode
Map.css_rules: .leaflet-layer { filter: invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(95%) contrast(90%); } .leaflet-container { background: #0f1715; }
Map.interactions: Floating search bar at top, Locate Me FAB bottom-right

SwipeDeck.interaction: Touch-based drag with rotation and opacity fade
SwipeDeck.feedback: Like (Right) = Green Overlay, Nope (Left) = Red Overlay
SwipeDeck.card_style: Full bleed image, gradient overlay at bottom for text readability, rounded-3xl

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL TAILWIND CSS IMMEDIATELY: `npm install -D tailwindcss postcss autoprefixer && npx tailwindcss init -p`.
Configure `tailwind.config.js` to include the custom colors defined in this file.
Install `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` for class management if not present.
Use the CSS Filter Hack for the Leaflet Map dark mode. Do NOT use an API key for map tiles.
Ensure the app is mobile-first by wrapping the entire application in a centered container with `max-w-md`.
Implement the Swipe Deck with `framer-motion` if available, or standard CSS transforms + React state.
Mock all data (User, Destinations, Bucket List) in a separate `data/mock.ts` file.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container global css. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from `src/components/ui` when applicable.
